blocks.text: Match preview: England A Women face India A Women in Unofficial 2nd T20 (T20) on Tue, 23 Jun, 2026, 11:00 pm at County Ground Northampton. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

India A Women tour of England 2026

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.

Overcast · High 34°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
